cartesian coordinate system

Search: Download Options: Format:  Query

Description: definition:coordinate system in Euclidean space which gives the position of points relative to n mutually perpendicular straight axes all having the same unit of measure

PropertyValue
type (rdf:type) Class (owl:Class) [x]

subClassOf (rdfs:subClassOf)

definition (skos:definition)
coordinate system in Euclidean space which gives the position of points relative to n mutually perpendicular straight axes all having the same unit of (...) measure
(rdf:langString) (iso6391:en)
